title: Visceral: Between the Ropes of Madness
original_title: Visceral: Entre las cuerdas de la locura
overview: A washed-up boxer finally gets his big break to prove himself worthy of the champion's gloves, but becomes a vessel of pure evil and a relentless instrument of destruction. Will he become Hell's next champion?
